posts.author: Nishit_Shah2
posts.community: CSB BANK - will it become next HDFC Bank?
posts.text: I think there is a concern on Wholesale book as well as their bulk deposits. Interest income not coming in as compared to loan book growth and wholesale dragging all the margins with no visible advantage. Also some chatter on street is they brought in entire Indusind bank wholesale team and underwriting standards are not top notch plus very low yielding loans.
